headline: US Oil Drillers Continue to Add Rigs
summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States rose this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday

raw.headline: US Oil Drillers Continue to Add Rigs

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on Baker Hughes Stock?
summary: As Baker Hughes has considerably outperformed the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
